prose:
Fukui reactivity indices for acrolein — computed via the chemkit `fukui-reactivity` skill: DFT at tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fitting RIJK) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied XYZ from `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/acrolein/acrolein.xyz`, not optimized (single-point protocol). Partial charges (Mulliken) were obtained for the neutral, cation (+1, doublet), and anion (–1, doublet) states to compute the Fukui functions.

SCF convergence: no convergence warnings reported (assumed converged). Warnings from the integrity checks (all verbatim):
• sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)
• sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)
• common header present

Results:
• Most electrophilic site: C4 (atom label 4) with f⁺ = 0.64232102
• Most nucleophilic site: O1 (atom label 1) with f⁻ = 0.39388616
